name: SV Meteorites
description: SV Meteorites public inventory with individual specimen detail pages and images.
notes: Enabled after independent validation. Parser follows public inventory/detail pages, requires individual specimen fields, and rejects category/non-listing rows.

name: Meteorlab
description: New England Meteoritical Services static catalog pages for larger specimens and micromounts.
notes: Enabled after independent validation. Parser reads old static catalog tables, captures specimen images, skips sold markers, and supports email-for-price rows.

name: BAITYLIA
description: BAITYLIA / Meteorite and More categorized inventory with individual specimen pages.
notes: Enabled after independent validation. Parser follows categorized inventory rows to detail pages and rejects header/category rows.

name: Meteorite Exchange
description: WooCommerce meteorite dealer catalog with category pages and .html product detail pages.
notes: Enabled after strict bounded validation. Parser follows only Woo single-product/type-product root .html detail pages with product metadata, rejects category/archive/add-to-cart/filter links, and excludes gift, stand, dust, jewelry, cabochon, and other non-specimen products.

name: FossilEra
description: Large FossilEra active-only meteorite category with specimen cards, prices, images, and detail pages.
notes: Enabled after independent validation. Source-specific parser uses active-only /meteorites/ detail pages, schema/meta/detail text, pagination, and sold-card suppression.

name: Prehistoric Fossils Meteorites
description: Narrow WooCommerce NWA meteorites category with product details, prices, stock status, images, and specimen weights.
notes: Enabled after bounded validation. Parser follows only the NWA meteorites category pagination to /product/ details, requires product/cart or stock proof, exact individual weights, prices, images, and rejects frames, gem jars, displays, and other non-specimen products.

name: Galactic Stone & Ironworks
description: BigCommerce storefront with meteorite product grids, rel=next pagination, and card pricing.
notes: Enabled after strict bounded validation. Parser accepts only available BigCommerce productView detail pages with add-to-cart proof, title-derived individual weights, and title meteorite/class markers; rejects micromounts without weights, collections, jewelry, displays, memorabilia, and out-of-stock cards.

name: The Meteorite Market
description: Old static meteorite photo catalog with allowlisted sales pages and table-based specimens.
notes: Enabled after independent validation. Static allowlist parser dedupes repeated item cells and rejects sold prices from validated sale pages.

name: Arizona Skies Meteorites
description: Mixed static meteorite, fossil, jewelry, and collectible site requiring narrow meteorite allowlists.
notes: Enabled after strict validation. Parser follows only Lunar/Martian final specimen pages and clean inexpensive meteorite rows, requires exact price, individual weight, and valid specimen image, and rejects sold, jewelry, fossils, collectibles, display boxes, dust/vials, and broad page-copy rows.

name: Aerolite Meteorites
description: Specialist WooCommerce meteorite dealer with narrow shop categories and individual product pages.
notes: Enabled after independent validation. Parser uses browser-like headers, narrow shop categories, schema/meta prices, and excludes sold, jewelry, books, stands, equipment, and other non-specimens.

name: Astro West
description: WooCommerce meteorite category with individual product detail pages, prices, weights, stock status, and images.
notes: Enabled after bounded validation. Parser follows /collections/meteorites/ pagination to /products/ details, requires Woo product/add-to-cart proof and title meteorite markers, and excludes jewelry, pendants, display boxes, gift sets, and other non-specimen products while not rejecting the broad gifts category alone.

name: IMPACTIKA
description: Long-running specialist source with Woo Store API products whose descriptions can contain individual sale rows.
notes: Enabled after strict validation. Parser uses smaller Woo Store API pages with browser-like JSON headers and longer timeout, requires available product status plus one exact row price and individual weight, and rejects sold, lot, range, from-to, per-gram, books, prints, and non-specimen rows.

name: SkyFall Meteorites
description: Specialist meteorite seller with Woo product sitemap and meteorites-for-sale detail paths.
notes: Enabled after bounded validation. Parser only accepts /meteorites-for-sale/ product pages with positive title weights and prices; rejects NFS, 0g, read-more, jewelry, books, and category failures.

name: Meteolovers
description: IMCA-certified Woo/Elementor shop for meteorites, tektites, and related collectibles.
notes: Enabled after independent validation. Parser follows Elementor/Woo product cards under meteorite paths, uses schema/meta prices, and verifies sold/status/category coverage.

name: justMETEORITES
description: Authentic meteorite and impactite dealer with Woo product pages and visible stock markers.
notes: Enabled after bounded validation. Parser uses the product sitemap, rejects /c/sold/, knife-material/gift/non-specimen paths, and out-of-stock/sold detail pages, and relies on schema prices.

name: Collector Secret Meteorites
description: Meteorite page appears to be an eBay affiliate/aggregator rather than direct verified inventory.
notes: Policy-blocked: do not scrape broad eBay affiliate feeds. Parser is an explicit no-op so enabling cannot fall back to generic output.

name: Mini Museum Meteorites
description: Shopify meteorite collection mixed with gifts, jewelry, complete collections, and educational specimen cards.
notes: Enabled only for a narrow subset after bounded validation. Parser uses collection products.json with strict product_type, gift/jewelry/card/collection exclusions, positive prices, and title-weight requirements to avoid generic retail products.

name: Fossil Realm Meteorite Collection
description: Shopify meteorite collection with product_type Meteorites, specimen details, prices, images, and provenance.
notes: Enabled after independent validation. Shopify products.json parser uses browser-like retrying fetches, requires product_type Meteorites, available variants, positive non-placeholder prices, and title weights.

name: TOP Meteorite
description: Shopify-style rare meteorite dealer with active specimen products and some non-specimen merchandise risk.
notes: Enabled after independent validation. Shopify products.json parser uses browser-like retrying fetches, requires product_type Specimen, available variants, positive prices, title weights, and meteorite keywords.

name: Buy Meteorite
description: Shopify meteorite collection with available variants, exact title weights, prices, and product images.
notes: Enabled after bounded validation. Parser uses the meteorites collection products.json only, requires meteorite product type and tag, available variants, positive prices, title-derived weights, images, and strict non-specimen rejection.

name: PolandMET
description: Specialist WooCommerce meteorite shop with individual product pages, Store API inventory, prices, weights, classifications, and images.
notes: Parser uses the Woo Store API with in-stock/add-to-cart checks, title-derived individual weights, non-specimen exclusions, image fallbacks, and conservative API/product caps to avoid heavy crawling.

name: KD Meteorites
description: Long-running static meteorite dealer site with categorized specimen pages, exact weights, prices, and images.
notes: Parser is bounded to specimen sale hubs, rejects jewelry/knives/gifts/info pages, requires exact row price and weight, and requires row/column-associated product images.

name: eBay - whitehouse_meteorites
description: Disabled official eBay Browse API connector for one vetted meteorite seller allowlist entry.
notes: Keep disabled until EBAY_CLIENT_ID/EBAY_CLIENT_SECRET are configured and rows are manually reviewed. Fixed-price, seller-allowlist only; no broad eBay scraping.

name: eBay - topherspin
description: Disabled official eBay Browse API connector for one vetted meteorite seller allowlist entry.
notes: Keep disabled until API secrets are configured and rows are manually reviewed. Fixed-price seller allowlist only; strict lot/gift/jewelry filtering applies.

name: eBay - fobos13ali
description: Disabled official eBay Browse API connector for one seller from the user-provided candidate list.
notes: Candidate only. Enable only after API credential setup and manual storefront quality review.

name: eBay - yoda_meteorites
description: Disabled official eBay Browse API connector for one seller from the user-provided candidate list.
notes: Candidate only. Enable only after API credential setup and manual storefront quality review.

name: eBay - the.interstellar.collection
description: Disabled official eBay Browse API connector for one vetted marketplace candidate.
notes: Candidate only; prior snippets suggest possible dust/vial noise. Enable only after manual review confirms enough individual specimens.

name: Meteorite Recon
description: Static Meteorite Recon sale pages with individual stone and iron specimens.
notes: Enabled after bounded public-page review. Parser fetches only the Stones and Irons sale pages, scopes rows to WordPress sale sections, requires exact price and individual specimen weight, keeps remote image URLs, and rejects offer-price, sold, category, and non-specimen rows.

name: WWMeteorites
description: Wix-rendered direct meteorite dealer sale pages with row-level specimen prices and weights.
notes: Enabled after bounded public-page review. Parser fetches only the configured SSR index and discovered same-domain detail pages up to max_detail_pages, requires exact row price and weight, rejects sold, category, ambiguous lot/range, and non-specimen rows, and keeps only remote image URLs.

name: eBay - meteoritetreasure
description: Disabled official eBay Browse API connector for one marketplace storefront candidate.
notes: Provisional seller allowlist from the /str/meteoritetreasure slug. Keep disabled until EBAY_CLIENT_ID/EBAY_CLIENT_SECRET are configured, seller identity is verified via the API, and rows are manually reviewed. Fixed-price, seller-allowlist only; no broad eBay scraping.

name: eBay - Top Meteorite Store
description: Marketplace storefront candidate for TOP Meteorite on eBay.
notes: Provisional seller allowlist from the /str/topmeteorite slug. Keep disabled until EBAY_CLIENT_ID/EBAY_CLIENT_SECRET are configured, seller identity is verified via the API, and rows are manually reviewed. Fixed-price, seller-allowlist only; no broad eBay scraping.

name: Etsy - SpaceTreasuresUS
description: Etsy marketplace storefront candidate from the provided source list.
notes: Assessed 2026-06-17: narrow public storefront fetch returned HTTP 403, so a safe/reliable HTML parser is not feasible. Keep disabled; use official Etsy Open API credentials plus manual row-quality review before any parser work. Do not scrape broad Etsy search/category pages.

name: Etsy - SPACEMANGIFT
description: Etsy marketplace storefront candidate from the provided source list.
notes: Assessed 2026-06-17: narrow public storefront fetch returned HTTP 403, so a safe/reliable HTML parser is not feasible. Keep disabled; use official Etsy Open API credentials plus manual row-quality review before any parser work. Do not scrape broad Etsy search/category pages.

name: Etsy - saharagems
description: Etsy marketplace storefront candidate from the provided source list.
notes: Assessed 2026-06-17: narrow public storefront fetch returned HTTP 403, so a safe/reliable HTML parser is not feasible. Keep disabled; use official Etsy Open API credentials plus manual row-quality review before any parser work. Do not scrape broad Etsy search/category pages.

name: eBay Marketplace Search
description: Broad eBay marketplace search/category source.
notes: Policy-blocked for normal scraping. Use official Browse API seller allowlists only; do not scrape broad eBay search/category pages.

name: Etsy Marketplace Search
description: Broad Etsy marketplace search/category source.
notes: Policy-blocked for normal scraping. Do not scrape broad Etsy search/category pages. Etsy storefronts should use official Etsy Open API credentials plus vetted storefront allowlists and strict souvenir/gift filtering before any enablement.

name: Facebook Meteorite Groups
description: Community sales/research source that is not practical for public scheduled scraping.
notes: Reference/backlog visibility only. Do not scrape login-gated Facebook groups in this project.

name: IMCA Member List
description: Reference list useful for seller vetting, not an inventory source.
notes: Reference/backlog visibility only. IMCA itself does not sell meteorites and should not be scraped as inventory.
